BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin after Coral Ridge signaled a lease bump at the October 2026 renewal. Pre-quarterly-review estimate.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Revisit with Anthony once 2025 actuals are closed.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent increases to $3,400/mo at October renewal
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $13,420 + $200 increase = $13,620. At $145/visit net of overhead, $13,620 / $145 = 93.9 - 94 billable visits/month minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Minimal. Well within capacity at ~80 to 88 visits/month across three clinicians.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - rent to $3,600/mo plus therapist hire
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Tighter. The LCSW/LMHC hire stretches the budget but adds billable therapy capacity to offset.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~92 to 96 billable visits/month at current cost structure. At full schedule across three clinicians we have headroom. Main concern is the seasonal summer dip and the lease bump landing together.
